ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the department was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the department information was last modified */,
  "parent_dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "years_of_service" INTEGER /* Years of service of the employee */,
  "estimated_salary" REAL /* Estimated monthly salary of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Job description of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's emergency contact */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the employee's record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the employee's information was last modified */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "review_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the performance review */,
  "goals_and_objectives" TEXT /* Goals and objectives set for the employee */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the performance review was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the performance review was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer conducting the program */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training program */,
  "training_level" TEXT /* Level of the training program */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the training program was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the training program was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "emp_training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-training record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who completed the training */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the training was completed */,
  "certificate_path" TEXT /* Path to the certificate of completion */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Status of the employee's training */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the employee's training record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the employee's training record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_requests" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the leave request was submitted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave period */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., vacation, sick leave) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the approver */,
  "leave_status" TEXT /* Status of the leave (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  "leave_comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the leave request */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the leave request was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the leave request was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("approver_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the incentive */,
  "incentive_type" TEXT /* Type of incentive (e.g., bonus, stock options) */,
  "incentive_amount" REAL /* Amount of the incentive */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the incentive was awarded */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the incentive */,
  "incentive_status" TEXT /* Status of the incentive (e.g., awarded, pending, rejected) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the incentive was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the incentive was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_incentives_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role to which the permission is assigned */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module or feature the permission applies to */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action the role can perform (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary adjustment */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose salary was adjusted */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the salary adjustment */,
  "new_salary" REAL /* New estimated monthly salary */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary adjustment */,
  "adjusted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the salary adjustment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the salary adjustment was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the salary adjustment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_adjustments_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact information (e.g., phone, address) */,
  "contact_value" TEXT /* Value of the contact information */,
  "contact_status" TEXT /* Status of the contact information (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the contact information was added */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the contact information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_contacts_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)
